News Reports

Current Operations

    Other Operations

  • Joint Task Force-Southern Border Marks One Year of Success, Bolstering Southern Border Security Through Integrated Operations US Northern Command 14 Mar 2026 -- Joint Task Force-Southern Border (JTF-SB) marks its one-year anniversary, March 14, 2026. This milestone highlights JTF-SB's first 365 days of executing agile, full-scale, and partner-focused missions in support of the Department of Homeland Security's (DHS) southern border mission.

    • Operation Epic Fury / Operation Roaring Lion | Operation True Promise 4

  • Statement on the KC-135 Incident CENTCOM 14 Mar 2026 -- U.S. Central Command Spokesperson U.S. Navy Capt. Tim Hawkins provided the following statement:
  • Over 50,000 U.S. troops involved in military strikes on Iran: Pentagon People's Daily 14 Mar 2026 -- More than 50,000 U.S. service members are involved in the military strikes against Iran, a senior Pentagon official said Friday.
  • U.S. won't allow shipping in Strait of Hormuz "to be contested": Hegseth People's Daily 14 Mar 2026 -- The United States will not allow shipping in the Strait of Hormuz "to be contested" by Iran, U.S. Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth said Friday.
  • Trump blew $19 billion during US-Israeli war on Iran: US congressman Press TV 14 Mar 2026 -- US Congressman Jim McGovern has condemned the US-Israeli aggression against Iran, saying the money wasted during the war could have been used to prevent infectious diseases in the United States.
  • Trump Announces Destruction of All Military Targets on Iran's Kharg Island Sputnik 14 Mar 2026 -- US President Donald Trump said the American military had destroyed all military targets on Iran's Kharg Island in the Persian Gulf amid the ongoing conflict.
  • Five US Refueling Planes Damaged On Ground In Saudi Arabia: Report RFE/RL 14 Mar 2026 -- Five US Air ⁠Force ⁠refueling planes were struck and damaged on ⁠the ground at an air base in Saudi Arabia, the ⁠Wall Street Journal reported, citing two unnamed U.S. officials.
  • Trump Says US Forces 'Totally Obliterated' Targets On Kharg Island RFE/RL 14 Mar 2026 -- President Donald Trump said on social media that US forces had carried out "one of the most powerful bombing" raids in the history of the Middle East on Iran's strategic Kharg Island in the Strait of Hormuz.
  • Five US refueling planes damaged in Iranian missile strike in Saudi air base: Report Press TV 14 Mar 2026 -- Five US Air Force refueling planes have reportedly been damaged in an Iranian missile strike at Prince Sultan Air Base in Saudi Arabia.

  • IRGC strikes US-run al-Kharj air base in wave 51 of retaliation Press TV 14 Mar 2026 -- The Islamic Revolution Guards Corps (IRGC) has announced the execution of the 51st wave of Operation True Promise 4, launching missile strikes against US military installations across the region in retaliation for ongoing American-Israeli aggression against the country.
  • True Promise 4: Iran and resistance axis ops. against US-Israeli assets on Mar. 14 Press TV 14 Mar 2026 -- Iranian armed forces and resistance groups across the region continue to carry out retaliatory military operations against the United States and the Israeli regime.
  • Iran says 43,000 civilian units damaged in US-Israeli attacks Press TV 14 Mar 2026 -- The Iranian government has released updated figures on damage to civilian infrastructure and casualties after 15 days of US-Israeli aggression against the Islamic Republic, reporting nearly 43,000 civilian buildings affected by enemy strikes.
  • Strait of Hormuz will remain closed: Iranian official Press TV 14 Mar 2026 -- A high-ranking member of Iran's Expediency Council says the closure of the Strait of Hormuz will remain in effect, adding that the United States is responsible for escalating insecurity in the West Asian region.
  • Iran's armed forces strike key US bases in region with missiles, drones: IRGC Press TV 14 Mar 2026 -- Iran's naval forces have successfully struck key targets within American bases, including Al Dhafra, Sheikh Isa, and Al-Udeid, following the US-Israeli aggression against the country.
  • 'Do not trust illusion of US power': Iranian military warns regional states Press TV 14 Mar 2026 -- The spokesman for the Iranian Armed Forces has called on Leaders of Muslim countries not to put trust in the illusion of US power, and unite against hypocrisy led by the United States and Israel.
  • Iran warns it will target origins of US missile launches in UAE cities Press TV 14 Mar 2026 -- The spokesperson for Iran's Khatam al-Anbiya Central Headquarters has announced that the country considers it a legitimate right to target the origins of US missile launches located in several Emirati cities.
  • Iran Strikes Target Suspected Locations of US, Israeli Commanders - IRGC Sputnik 14 Mar 2026 -- Iran will welcome any regional initiative leading to a just end to the conflict in the Middle East for Tehran, Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi said on Sunday.

  • US air defense system in Iraq embassy failed to intercept drone attack: Report Press TV 14 Mar 2026 -- The US air defense system in Baghdad failed to intercept an incoming drone strike on the American embassy in the early hours of Saturday, according to a report.
  • US air defense station at embassy in Baghdad targeted: Report Press TV 14 Mar 2026 -- The United States Embassy in the Iraqi capital of Baghdad reportedly came under attack in the early hours of Saturday, Al Hadath television channel reported.
  • Baghdad Blasts Target Iran-Allied Groups, US Embassy RFE/RL 14 Mar 2026 -- Explosions rocked multiple sites in Baghdad early on March 14, with an Iran-allied group being the target of two blasts while a drone attack reportedly targeted the US Embassy in the Iraqi capital.

  • Trump Says US Blasts Kharg Island, Vows Navy Escorts 'Will Happen Soon' In Strait RFE/RL 14 Mar 2026 -- US President Donald Trump said American forces have "totally obliterated" military sites on Iran's strategic Kharg Island in "one of the most powerful bombing raids" in Middle East history and he said the US Navy would soon begin escorting vessels through the Strait of Hormuz.

  • Iran Says Oil Exports Continue After Kharg Strikes As Fire Hits UAE Oil Hub RFE/RL 14 Mar 2026 -- Drone and missile attacks struck targets in Baghdad and the United Arab Emirates on March 14 as the war between Iran and a US-Israeli coalition continued to ripple across the Middle East, while Tehran said oil exports from its key Kharg Island terminal were continuing despite US strikes there.
  • Iran 'stands firm' in face of US-Israeli-imposed war: Baghaei Press TV 14 Mar 2026 -- Iran's Foreign Ministry spokesman has reiterated that the country stands firm in the face of the US-Israeli-imposed war.
  • Iran says attacks on its islands were launched from UAE, vows to respond Press TV 14 Mar 2026 -- Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi says US attacks on two Iranian islands in the Persian Gulf that took place overnight on Saturday originated in the United Arab Emirates (UAE), and he warns that Iran will definitely respond.
  • IRGC warns attacks on US banks will expand if more Iranian banks are targeted Press TV 14 Mar 2026 -- A spokesperson for the Islamic Revolution Guards Corps (IRGC) says Iranian attacks on American bank branches in neighboring countries were a response to US-Israeli strikes on Iranian bank properties earlier this week and briefly disrupted banking operations in the country.
  • Iran's intelligence forces dismantle US-Israeli linked mercenary cells in 3 provinces Press TV 14 Mar 2026 -- Iranian Intelligence Ministry says it has dismantled three mercenary cells affiliated with the Israeli regime and the United States in pre-emptive operations in the provinces of Mazandaran, Khuzestan and Khorasan Razavi.
  • Tehran to Trump: All regional energy facilities will be destroyed if Iran's energy infrastructure hit Press TV 14 Mar 2026 -- Iran has issued a stern warning to the United States, asserting that any attack on its energy infrastructure will be reciprocated with the destruction of all energy facilities across the region.
  • Regional security tied to cooperation among regional states, not US presence: Iran Press TV 14 Mar 2026 -- The security and stability of the region are highly dependent on cooperation among regional countries, not the American presence, Iran's foreign ministry spokesman Esmaeil Baghaei said on Saturday.
  • Tensions in Strait of Hormuz caused by US-Israeli aggression: Iranian envoy Press TV 14 Mar 2026 -- Iran's ambassador to Britain and permanent representative to the International Maritime Organization (IMO) has held the "unlawful and irresponsible" actions of the United States and Israel in the Strait of Hormuz responsible for the escalating tensions in the strategic waterway.
  • US to Face Harsh Retaliation If It Tries to Kill Iran's New Supreme Leader Sputnik 14 Mar 2026 -- The United States will face severe retaliation if it tries to kill Iran's new Supreme leader Mojtaba Khamenei, Iranian Ambassador to Russia Kazem Jalali told Sputnik.

  • In Israel's Medical Bunkers, Doctors Ready To Work 'Indefinitely' RFE/RL 14 Mar 2026 -- After several twists down a concrete stairwell, a buzzing underground world is revealed. Ambulances unloading patients on gurneys, rows of field-hospital tents, workmen fixing overhead cables, and medical personnel in an array of uniforms.

  • China steps up diplomatic push as US-Israeli war against Iran hits two weeks Global Times 14 Mar 2026 -- As the US-Israeli war against Iran entered the two-week mark on Friday, global concerns are mounting with almost no signs of relief, along with growing causalities, soaring oil prices and tumbling stocks.

  • Saudi Arabia cuts oil output by 20% as Iran continues to control traffic in Strait of Hormuz: Report Press TV 14 Mar 2026 -- Saudi Arabia has cut oil production by about 2 million barrels per day (bpd), as Iran continues to restrict traffic through the Strait of Hormuz for countries allowing the US to use their soil for aggression against it, says a report.
  • Ministry of Defense Spokesperson: Two Drones Intercepted and Destroyed in Riyadh and Eastern Regions SPA 14 Mar 2026
  • Ministry of Defense Spokesperson: Six Ballistic Missiles Launched Toward Al-Kharj Governorate Intercepted and Destroyed SPA 14 Mar 2026
  • Ministry of Defense Spokesperson: A Drone Intercepted and Destroyed in Eastern Region SPA 14 Mar 2026
  • Ministry of Defense Spokesperson: Two Drones Intercepted and Destroyed in Eastern Region SPA 14 Mar 2026

  • Ministry of Defense Spokesperson: Drone Intercepted and Destroyed in the Empty Quarter SPA 14 Mar 2026

  • Statement by Foreign Minister Eide on the Suffering of Civilians in the Middle East Government of Norway 14 Mar 2026 -- 'The Middle East is in flames. Two weeks after Israel and the United States launched attacks on Iran, the situation is becoming increasingly dramatic. At least 16 countries are now directly affected by the war. The consequences are already global'.
  • Yemen says it may shut strategic Bab el-Mandeb Strait in support of Iran Press TV 14 Mar 2026 -- A senior Yemeni military commander says the closure of the strategic Bab el-Mandeb Strait will be among the primary options of the Ansarullah resistance movement if it decides to assist Iran fight off an ongoing US-Israeli onslaught against Iran.
  • 'Finger on the trigger': Yemen says decision made to stand with Iran against US-Israeli aggression Press TV 14 Mar 2026 -- A senior official from Yemen's Ansarallah resistance movement has confirmed that the country is in complete coordination with Iran and the resistance axis amid the ongoing Israeli-American aggression against the Islamic Republic.

Defense Policy / Programs

  • Corvette Boykiy performs artillery firing at maritime target in Baltic Sea Russia MoD 14 Mar 2026 -- Boykiy

  • North Korea Launches 10 Ballistic Missiles Toward Sea of Japan — South Korea Sputnik 14 Mar 2026 -- The missiles flew about 350 km, though their specifications are currently unknown, the South Korean Joint Chiefs of Staff (JCS) said.

  • INDIAN NAVAL SHIP TRIKAND CONCLUDES PORT CALL AT PORT LOUIS, MAURITIUS India PIB 14 Mar 2026 -- INS Trikand concluded her port call at Port Louis, Mauritius on 13 Mar 26. The ship participated in the 58th Mauritius National Day Parade on 12 Mar 26 with a marching contingent, naval band and integral helicopter for the fly-past, at Champ de Mars, Port Louis.

  • Canada and Norway strengthen defence cooperation in space Canada 14 Mar 2026 -- Today, the Minister of National Defence, the Honourable David J. McGuinty, and the Minister of Defence of Norway, Tore O. Sandvik, signed a Letter of Intent to deepen bilateral cooperation in the space domain. This agreement builds on Canada and Norway's long-standing collaboration and reinforces both countries' commitment to national and collective defence.
  • Canada and Norway sign Letter of Intent on Space cooperation Government of Norway 14 Mar 2026 -- Canada and Norway will further strengthen their defence cooperation in the space domain. This Saturday, a Letter of Intent between the two countries was signed in Oslo.

  • International Observers Follow Cold Response 2026 Forsvaret - Norwegian Armed Forces 14 Mar 2026 -- Cold Response is a defensive exercise. As part of demonstrating transparency, Norway has invited several international representatives to observe the exercise.

  • Serbian president confirms buying Chinese missiles after photos leaked; Chinese expert highlights their high compatibility Global Times 14 Mar 2026 -- Serbia recently purchased Chinese CM-400AKG air-to-surface ballistic missiles for its air force, becoming the weapon's first European operator, Serbian President Aleksandar Vucic said late on Thursday, media reported, and a Chinese expert highlighted the missile's high level of compatibility with the existing aircraft.

Defense Industry

  • Baykar unveils new K2 kamikaze drone in video set to 'Waltz No. 2' Azerbaijan State News Agency - (AZERTAC) 14 Mar 2026 -- Turkish drone manufacturer Baykar on Saturday unveiled a new kamikaze unmanned aerial vehicle, the K2, in a video set to Waltz No. 2, featuring artificial intelligence-based flight and targeting systems, according to Anadolu Agency.

  • Israel submits Counter-Memorial to the ICJ Israel MFA 14 Mar 2026 -- As demonstrated in the Counter-Memorial, the Court lacks jurisdiction, and South Africa's allegations should be dismissed in their entirety.

  • In Beirut, Guterres demands end to Middle East war: Civilians 'deserve to live without fear' Azerbaijan State News Agency - (AZERTAC) 14 Mar 2026 -- The UN Secretary-General on Saturday called on the international community to intensify support for the Government and people of Lebanon, warning that the south of the country "risks being turned into a wasteland," according to the official website of the organization.
  • In Beirut, Guterres demands end to Middle East war: Civilians 'deserve to live without fear' UN News 14 Mar 2026 -- The UN Secretary-General on Saturday called on the international community to intensify support for the Government and people of Lebanon, warning that the south of the country "risks being turned into a wasteland."

  • OIC urges the international community to stop the Israeli occupation's closure of Al-Aqsa Mosque Organization of Islamic Cooperation (OIC) 14 Mar 2026 -- The Secretary-General of the Organization of Islamic Cooperation (OIC), Hissein Brahim Taha, sent urgent letters to UN Secretary-General António Guterres and European Union Foreign Policy Commissioner Kaya Callas, expressing his strong condemnation of the Israeli occupation's closure of the Al-Aqsa Mosque to worshippers during the holy month of Ramadan

    • Other Conflicts

  • Chinese FM calls for resolving issues between Afghanistan and Pakistan through dialogue, consultation Global Times 14 Mar 2026 -- Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi said on Friday that the issues between Afghanistan and Pakistan can only be resolved through dialogue and consultation.

News Reports

  • Russia's war of aggression against Ukraine: EU extends individual listings over Ukraine's territorial integrity for a further six months EC/CEU 14 Mar 2026 -- The Council decided today to prolong the restrictive measures targeting those responsible for undermining or threatening the territorial integrity, sovereignty and independence of Ukraine for another six months, until 15 September 2026.
  • Press release on the exchange of congratulatory messages between Foreign Minister Sergey Lavrov and Minister of Foreign Affairs of the Bolivarian Republic of Venezuela Yván Gil Russia Ministry of Foreign Affairs 14 Mar 2026
  • European Union extends sanctions against more than 2,600 individuals and entities Estonia MFA 14 Mar 2026 -- On 14 March, European Union ambassadors reached a unanimous political agreement to extend individual sanctions against more than 2,600 persons and entities that are undermining Ukraine's territorial integrity, sovereignty, and independence.
  • EU Member States Agree to Extend Sanctions Against Russia Latvia MFA 14 Mar 2026 -- On Saturday, 14 March 2026, the Council of the European Union (EU) unanimously decided to extend for six months the restrictive measures against those responsible for undermining or threatening the territorial integrity, sovereignty, and independence of Ukraine.

  • China releases full text of government work report People's Daily 14 Mar 2026 -- The full text of the Report on the Work of the Government was released via Xinhua News Agency on Friday.
  • China calls for keeping global critical mineral supply chains safe, stable, opposes 'small-circle' rules Global Times 14 Mar 2026 -- China on Friday called on all parties to play a constructive role in safeguarding the stability and security of global critical minerals supply chains and expressed opposition to undermining the international economic and trade order through "small-circle" rules.

  • PLA activities in the waters and airspace around Taiwan ROC MND 14 Mar 2026
